introduction.title: Introduction
content: I am a frontend engineer specializing in SPA development with React and Vue.js. Recently, I have been expanding into full-stack development using SSR frameworks like Next.js and Nuxt.js.
I am experienced in static typing with TypeScript and test-driven development using Jest and Cypress.

I am passionate about keeping up with the latest technologies and actively learning new ones. By leveraging this knowledge in technology selection and architecture design, I contribute to improving the quality of not only projects but also teams and products as a whole.

latest.title: Recent Achievements
content: Built an on-call escalation system using monitoring tools, Slack App, and Twilio
Developed a browser-based media player plugin for the music streaming service LINE MUSIC
Developed an In-App-WebView application for setting ringtones and call tones on the LINE messaging app
Led the introduction and implementation of E2E testing for the LINE MUSIC web app, reducing manual QA costs
Led the migration of the LINE MUSIC web app from Vue 2.x to 3.x and introduced TypeScript

content.title: Queensland University of Technology
content.major: Faculty of Information Technology, Computer Science
content.minor: Faculty of Information Technology, Project Management

projects.title: LINE MUSIC
projects.description: Maintenance and development of the web application for the music streaming service

projects.title: WebView Performance Optimization PoC
projects.description: Led a PoC project to evaluate the performance impact of migrating a Vue.js SPA WebView application to Next.js with SSR, with the API server deployed on the same K8s cluster. Managed verification items and progress, delivering findings to the planning team.

projects.title: On-Call System with Slack App & Twilio
projects.description: Built a system to escalate issues to relevant engineers, PMs, and POs during outages not detected by monitoring tools

projects.title: Browser Media Player Plugin for LINE MUSIC
projects.description: Led the browser plugin development for replacing the media player during the system separation from Naver. In addition to development, I detailed black-boxed specifications, coordinated migration plans with products using LINE MUSIC content playback, and automated distribution via internal npm and CDN.

projects.title: Unreleased Web Application Development Lead
projects.description: Led frontend development of an unreleased application involving cross-product teams, managing tasks, progress, and specification alignment with stakeholders.

projects.title: LINE Ringtone Development Lead
projects.description: Led frontend development of the LINE-exclusive WebView application for setting call ringtones and hold music. Managed development tasks, progress, and API specification coordination with other teams. Released as one of the launch features of LINEYahoo's premium service 'LYP Premium', contributing to KPI achievement.

projects.title: Automated Testing for LINE MUSIC Web App
projects.description: Automated 70% of existing manual regression tests using Cypress with CI, reducing the average regression QA period by 50%

projects.title: LINE MUSIC Web App Vue 2.x to 3.x Migration
projects.description: Led the migration of the LINE MUSIC web application from Vue 2.x to 3.x. Also migrated the build system from vue-cli to Vite and introduced testing-library + Vitest where no unit tests existed. Achieved not only EOL library migration but also performance improvements.

projects.title: LINE MUSIC Coin Refund Web App
projects.description: Led frontend development of the refund application based on the Payment Services Act, following the discontinuation of the coin-based music purchase feature in LINE MUSIC. Managed task breakdown and development cycles. This project also served as a PoC for the Vue 3 migration and helped team members familiarize themselves with the new syntax.

content.name: HTML
contents: I understand HTML tags and their roles, and can read and comprehend the HTML Living Standard and HTML5 specifications.
I create meaningful, semantic markup that is accessible to search engines and screen readers.
I properly use `aria-*` attributes to build accessible websites.
I understand the relationship with JavaScript (event propagation, DOM tree, Shadow DOM) and can work with Web Components.
I understand how HTML structure impacts SEO.
I stay current with emerging technologies like HTML Modules and Declarative Shadow DOM.

content.name: CSS
contents: I understand core CSS properties including selectors, box model, layout, colors, fonts, text, animations, and transitions.
I understand CSS architecture methodologies like BEM, OOCSS, SMACSS, and Atomic Design.
I design CSS with performance in mind, addressing layout shifts and hardware acceleration optimization.
I can evaluate and adopt the latest CSS specifications for production use.
I make appropriate technology choices without being dependent on specific CSS frameworks.

content.name: JavaScript
contents: I have deep knowledge of the JavaScript language specification and am proficient with ES6+ features.
I understand design patterns including modules, factories, singletons, and observers.
I understand module systems like ESM, CommonJS, and UMD.
I understand Web APIs and browser internals: DOM, BOM, Event Loop, async processing, CORS, storage APIs, IndexedDB, Service Workers, etc.
I understand JavaScript performance optimization and security best practices.
I stay current with JavaScript trends: ESNext, TC39 proposals, Babel, TypeScript, Flow, WebAssembly, etc.

content.name: Vue.js
contents: I am proficient with Vue 3 Composition API and Setup API, and can lead Vue 2 to 3 migrations.
I can work with state management solutions like Pinia, Vuex, and composables.
I can build advanced SPA routing with Vue Router.
I understand rendering and performance optimization using v-once, v-memo, v-bind, virtual scrolling, and keep-alive.
I understand design patterns like Container/Presentational and Atomic Design.

content.name: React
contents: I understand the Virtual DOM rendering mechanism for high-performance UIs.
I am proficient with React Hooks and can lead Class to Function component migrations.
I can work with state management libraries like Redux, Jotai, Zustand, and Context API.
I optimize API communication using data fetching libraries like React Query and SWR.
I can build advanced SPA routing with React Router.
I understand Container/Presentational patterns and Atomic Design.
I understand React performance optimization and security best practices.

content.name: Next.js
contents: I understand the differences between App Router and Pages Router, and can design appropriate routing.
I understand rendering strategies (SSR, SSG, CSR, RSC) and can choose the right approach.
I understand performance optimization: image optimization, code splitting, pre-rendering, and caching strategies.
I am proficient with data fetching methods like getStaticProps, getServerSideProps, and getStaticPaths.
I can work with API Routes and Edge Functions.

content.name: TypeScript
contents: I have deep understanding of the type system, including Generics, Conditional Types, Mapped Types, and Template Literal Types.
I have led TypeScript adoption in existing JavaScript projects, designing and executing incremental migration strategies.
I can create and maintain type definitions (.d.ts) for libraries and APIs.
I leverage type-level programming to catch runtime errors at compile time.
I understand tsconfig.json options thoroughly and can configure optimal settings for each project.

content.name: Node.js
contents: I understand Node.js core concepts including the event loop, streams, and buffers.
I have experience building API servers with frameworks like Express and Fastify.
I can manage npm/pnpm packages, set up monorepo configurations, and build publishing pipelines to internal npm registries.
I have experience running Node.js in serverless environments such as AWS Lambda.
I utilize Node.js for building CLI tools and build scripts.

content.name: Playwright
contents: I can design and implement cross-browser E2E tests across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.
I design maintainable tests using the Page Object Model pattern.
I build advanced test scenarios using network interception, mocking, and request validation.
I optimize Playwright execution in CI environments with parallel runs and retry strategies.
I leverage Playwright for visual regression testing and automated accessibility testing.

content.name: Vitest
contents: I can design and implement unit and component tests in Vite-based projects.
I use mocks, spies, and stubs effectively to ensure test isolation and reliability.
I have experience integrating Testing Library with Vitest for component testing.
I configure coverage reporting and CI integration for test quality visibility.
I have led the introduction of Vitest into projects that previously had no testing.

content.name: Docker
contents: I understand Dockerfile optimization (multi-stage builds, layer caching) and can build efficient images.
I can set up and manage local development environments using Docker Compose.
I have experience containerizing frontend applications and integrating them into CI/CD pipelines.
I have experience deploying containers on Kubernetes clusters.

content.name: Github Actions
contents: I can design and build CI/CD workflows to automate builds, tests, and deployments.
I can create custom actions and select appropriate third-party actions.
I optimize workflows using matrix builds, caching strategies, and parallel execution.
I have experience building automated deployment pipelines to GitHub Pages and Vercel.
I build secure CI/CD environments with proper secret management and environment variable handling.

content.name: AI Agents
contents: I integrate coding assistants like Claude Code and GitHub Copilot into my daily development workflow to boost productivity.
I have experience integrating AI features into frontends using the Vercel AI SDK and Anthropic SDK.
I understand prompt engineering fundamentals and can design and implement LLM-powered features.
I properly review and validate AI tool outputs to ensure quality and security.
I leverage AI agents for automated code review, test generation, and documentation.

content.title: Portfolio Site
content.description: A personal portfolio website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, featuring i18n support and static export for GitHub Pages deployment.

content.title: On-Call Escalation System
content.description: An automated on-call system that integrates Slack App and Twilio to escalate incidents to relevant engineers and stakeholders when monitoring tools fail to detect outages.

content.title: Browser Media Player Plugin
content.description: A browser-based media player plugin for streaming services, supporting HLS playback with automated npm and CDN distribution pipelines.

content.title: Migrating a Large-Scale Vue 2 App to Vue 3
content.excerpt: Lessons learned from leading a production Vue 2 to Vue 3 migration, including build system changes and testing strategy.

content.title: Automating E2E Tests with Cypress in CI
content.excerpt: How we automated 70% of manual regression tests using Cypress, cutting QA time in half.

content.title: SSR Performance in WebView Applications
content.excerpt: Evaluating the performance impact of migrating from client-side SPA to SSR with Next.js in native WebView contexts.
